assertions.rationale: Class explicitly implements ISamlClaimsMapper with MapClaimsAsync method.

assertions.assertion: The mapper returns SamlAttribute objects with custom Name values
assertions.rationale: Returns SamlAttribute objects with custom Names like 'urn:custom:email'.

assertions.assertion: Warns that ISamlClaimsMapper completely replaces default claim mapping — DefaultClaimMappings are not applied
assertions.rationale: Prominently warns: 'Implementing ISamlClaimsMapper completely replaces the default claim mapping. The default mappings configured in IdentityServerOptions.Saml.DefaultClaimMappings are not applied.'

assertions.assertion: Registers the custom mapper with dependency injection (e.g., AddTransient)
